definitions.text: On the day after the present day.
At some point in the future; later on
examples: If you don’t get your life on track today, you’re going to be very sorry tomorrow.

definitions.text: On next (period of time other than a day, such as a week or a month), following the present (period of time).
The day after the present day.

examples: Live for what tomorrow has to offer, not for what yesterday has taken away.
